key_factors: Canada is ranked 32nd in the FIFA World Rankings (as of June 2026), while South Africa is ranked 56th.
This is a historic Round of 32 knockout stage debut for both nations, with neither having reached this stage before.
South Africa key veteran playmaker Themba Zwane remains suspended (serving the final of his 3-match ban), while Canada key midfielder Ismaël Koné is ruled out with a fractured tibia.
Canada captain Alphonso Davies is declared fit and confirmed to start, providing a significant boost to the host nation.
Both teams have 3 full rest days since their last group stage match on June 24, and both traveled around 1,100–1,200 miles to Los Angeles (no travel asymmetry).
South Africa's squad has an average age of 26.81 years, while Canada's squad has an average age of 25.81 years.

A 3-point probability shift was applied in favor of Canada due to the red card risk asymmetry, with South Africa having a high dismissal rate (2 red cards in 3 matches) and the assigned referee João Pinheiro also showing a high dismissal rate (1 red card in 1 match refereed).
unverified_or_unknown: The physical fitness of Stephen Eustáquio and Alfie Jones for Canada is unconfirmed, as both are managing knocks and undergo late fitness tests.
The exact starting lineups and tactical approaches are not officially confirmed at prediction time.

weather_check.conditions: 72°F, mostly cloudy, low chance of precipitation; indoor/covered canopy stadium

referee_check.details: South Africa's high tournament dismissal rate (2 red cards in 3 matches) combined with referee João Pinheiro's high dismissal rate (1 red card in 1 match) creates an elevated risk for South Africa.

social_sentiment_signal.bias_note: 58% of the sample came from r/CanadaSoccer, showing a strong bias towards Canada's tactical setup and expectations for the host nation.
sources_or_queries_used: site:reddit.com/r/CanadaSoccer OR site:reddit.com/r/soccer "South Africa" OR "Bafana Bafana" OR "Canada vs. South Africa"
